response.justification: Bogdan has over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience and recent, relevant work with AI agent infrastructure. His entrepreneurial project (GISCollective) and history of leading workshops demonstrate initiative and leadership potential. However, his resume is heavily weighted towards hands-on implementation rather than the high-level strategic planning, customer advisory, and platform-level vision required for this Director-level Principal role. His deep AI expertise also appears to be very recent, not the long-term, demonstrated focus the role prefers.
strengths: Extensive and broad software engineering background (15+ years)
Recent hands-on experience with AI agent infrastructure
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative and knowledge sharing
concerns: Lacks experience in a high-level strategic planning role
No evidence of advising external strategic customers
Seniority appears more aligned with Staff-level than Director-level

key_factors.factor: Mismatch in seniority and strategic scope
